query:
SELECT
  period,
  SUM(installment_amt) AS kw,
  SUM(close_amt) AS close_sum,
  SUM(bad_debt_amt) AS bad_debt_sum,
  SUM(installment_amt) + SUM(close_amt) + SUM(bad_debt_amt) AS total
FROM (
  SELECT
    SUBSTRING(paid_at, 1, 7) AS period,
    CAST(COALESCE(amount, 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))
      - CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))
      - CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS installment_amt,
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS close_amt,
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS bad_debt_amt
  FROM payment_transactions
  WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
    AND JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
    AND SUBSTRING(paid_at, 1, 7) = '2026-04'
    AND paid_at IS NOT NULL AND paid_at != ''
) AS sub
GROUP BY period;

      - CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2))
      - CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS installment_amt,
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS close_amt,
    CAST(COALESCE(JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount'), 0) AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS bad_debt_amt

GROUP BY period;
